character.name: Kael
character.state: Young town guard, off-duty. Early 20s. Tabard still on, sword belt on stool beside him. Sitting at the bar. Second ale. Keeps scanning the room — watch habit. Trained fighter but impulsive. Can see the front door clearly.

scene: The Broken Drum tavern. Evening. Fire burning low in a stone hearth. Rain outside. Woodsmoke and ale. A few quiet background patrons. A stranger in a dark cloak entered recently and stands near the hearth, hood up, dripping rainwater.
